Core Gameplay

Everything You Need to Survive

A massive contaminated world awaits. Every session brings new threats, discoveries, and survival challenges.

⚔

Brutal PvE Combat

Battle mutated creatures, aberrant monstrosities, and massive bosses using crafted weapons, abilities, and tactical squad play.

🏗

Deep Base Building

Construct, expand, and fortify your settlement. Design elaborate defenses, crafting stations, and living quarters in a destructible world.

🧬

Craft & Progress

Gather resources, research technologies, and craft powerful gear. Your survival depends on constant adaptation and upgrades.

🌍

Massive Open World

Explore a vast contaminated landscape filled with abandoned cities, strange ruins, and deadly anomalies around every corner.

👥

Co-op & PvP Servers

Team up with friends in co-op or test yourself in optional PvP modes. Choose your playstyle and dominate your server.

☣

Evolving Threat

New seasonal events, world bosses, and storyline updates keep the danger fresh. No two sessions feel the same.

Survival Experience

The World Is
Hostile. Adapt.

Once Human drops you into a contaminated wasteland where every decision matters. Resources are scarce, threats are everywhere, and the only way to thrive is to push deeper into the danger.

  • Dynamic day/night cycle with shifting threats
  • Hunger, thirst & contamination management
  • Scavenge abandoned facilities for rare blueprints
  • Craft weapons, armor & consumables
  • Uncover the dark lore behind the contamination
  • Seasonal world events & limited-time storylines
Base Building System

Build Your
Fortress

Design and construct sprawling settlements with modular building systems. Layer defenses, set up automated crafting, and create the ultimate survival hub for your squad.

  • Fully modular construction system
  • Automated resource processing & storage
  • Turrets, traps & layered defense grids
  • Electricity and power management
  • Terraforming and landscape modification
500+
Buildable Components
∞
Base Designs
4
Defense Tiers
PvP
Base Raids Available
Squad Gameplay

Better With
Your Crew

Team up with up to 4 players. Divide roles, share resources, and tackle world bosses that require coordinated tactics. The contamination is deadlier alone.

Builder

Fortify and design the base infrastructure.

Scout

Explore and locate rare resource caches.

Medic

Keep the squad alive through intense fights.

Gunner

Lead assaults and eliminate boss-tier threats.

Mutated Threats

Face the Aberrations

The contamination has twisted life into something unrecognizable. From common mutants to towering world bosses — every encounter demands preparation.

☠

Mutant Hordes

Swarms of contaminated creatures that overwhelm unprepared survivors.

🦑

Aberrant Beasts

Grotesque creatures fused with supernatural elements requiring tactical combat.

🧠

Stardust Entities

Supernatural intelligence that defies logic and conventional weaponry.

👁

World Bosses

Massive multi-phase boss encounters requiring full squad coordination.

Get Started

Three Steps to Survival

From zero to surviving in minutes. No subscription, no paywalls.

01

Download on Steam

Once Human is free to play on Steam. Click, add to your library, and download instantly. No payment required to start.

02

Create Your Character

Customize your survivor with deep character creation. Choose your appearance, traits, and begin your journey into the contamination.

03

Start Surviving

Drop in, gather resources, build your first shelter, and uncover the secrets of the contamination. Your story begins now.

Final Call

Ready to Survive?

Join millions of survivors in the most intense open-world survival experience on PC. Free. Now. On Steam.

Windows PC · Free to Play · Available on Steam · No Credit Card Required

FAQ

Common
Questions

Everything you need to know before entering the contaminated world of Once Human.

Yes — Once Human is completely free on Steam. No upfront cost. Cosmetic microtransactions exist but all core gameplay is free forever.

Windows 10/11 (64-bit), Intel Core i7 or equivalent, 16GB RAM, NVIDIA GTX 1060 or AMD RX 5600 XT, 40GB SSD free space. An SSD is strongly recommended.

Both. You can explore and survive completely alone, or team up with up to 4 players in co-op. Optional PvP servers are available for those wanting extra challenge.

Currently Windows PC only via Steam. No console or mobile version is available at this time.

Yes. Seasonal content drops introduce new storylines, world events, enemies, and gameplay features regularly. The team is actively supporting the game with major updates.

Launch the game, go through the character creator to customize your survivor, then get dropped into the world. The entire onboarding takes under 5 minutes.
